abort.no_devices_found: No Neewer WiFi lights were found on your network

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the light. Ensure it is on WiFi and not controlled by another app.
error.cannot_determine_client_ip: Home Assistant is not on the same subnet as the light. Ensure HA has a network adapter on that subnet.
error.invalid_subnet: Invalid subnet. Use CIDR notation such as 192.168.103.0/24
error.no_devices_found: No Neewer WiFi lights were discovered. Enter a subnet below or try manual setup.

discover.title: Discover Neewer WiFi lights
discover.description: Scanning may take up to 30 seconds on large networks. If nothing is found, enter a subnet to scan (for example 192.168.103.0/24).
